title: Business Idioms Advanced
description: Idioms used in boardrooms: move the needle, raise the bar, low-hanging fruit, in the weeds.
summary_pt_br: Idiomas executivos: move the needle, raise the bar, low-hanging fruit, in the weeds, boil the ocean.

scenes.subtitle_en: Idioms used in boardrooms: move the needle, raise the bar, low-hanging fruit, in the weeds.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Idiomas executivos: move the needle, raise the bar, low-hanging fruit, in the weeds, boil the ocean.

scenes.text_en: Idioms used in boardrooms: move the needle, raise the bar, low-hanging fruit, in the weeds. Focus: business idioms advanced. This feature won't really move the needle on revenue.
scenes.text_pt: Idiomas executivos: move the needle, raise the bar, low-hanging fruit, in the weeds, boil the ocean. Foco: business idioms advanced. Essa feature não vai mudar o jogo na receita.

scenes.title: Business Idioms Advanced
scenes.body_en: MOVE THE NEEDLE = make real impact. RAISE THE BAR = improve standard. LOW-HANGING FRUIT = easy wins. IN THE WEEDS = stuck in details. BOIL THE OCEAN = try to solve everything at once.
scenes.body_pt: Idiomas executivos: move the needle, raise the bar, low-hanging fruit, in the weeds, boil the ocean.

examples.en: This feature won't really move the needle on revenue.
examples.pt: Essa feature não vai mudar o jogo na receita.

examples.en: Let's start with the low-hanging fruit first.
We're too in the weeds to see the bigger picture.

exercise.question: Complete: "This ___ won't really move the needle on revenue."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "This feature won't really move the needle on revenue."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Essa feature não vai mudar o jogo na receita.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Let's start with the low-hanging fruit first.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Let's start with the low-hanging fruit first."
Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Business Idioms Advanced — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre business idioms advanced. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca, why pause the big project?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It won't move the needle this quarter.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Are we too in the weeds right now?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, we're losing the bigger picture.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Are we trying to boil the ocean?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: A little — we need to narrow focus.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do we raise the bar long-term?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Idioms save meetings three minutes at a time.

scenes.title: The Monday stand-up
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize Joca's strategic advice. Use at least three business idioms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the Monday stand-up, Joca listened to an hour of plans and then spoke with surprising clarity.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: None of these features will move the needle on revenue over the next two quarters, honestly.

paragraphs.speaker: Teammate
paragraphs.en: What do you suggest we prioritize — the ambitious projects or the quick wins?

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Let's pick the low-hanging fruit first, ship it fast, and raise the bar from there.

paragraphs.speaker: Teammate
paragraphs.en: We've been in the weeds for months. I think pulling back for strategy would help everyone.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Business idioms, Joca believed, are efficient precisely because they short-circuit long explanations.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Business Idioms Advanced". Idioms used in boardrooms: move the needle, raise the bar, low-hanging fruit, in the weeds. This feature won't really move the needle on revenue. Let's start with the low-hanging fruit first. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Business Idioms Advanced". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Business Idioms Advanced".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Business Idioms Advanced".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
